title: Cookie Preferences
intro: This site uses cookies to enhance your experience. See our Cookie Policy for details.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.desc: Required for the site to function. Cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.desc: Used to collect anonymous visit statistics.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.desc: Used for personalized advertising and retargeting.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.desc: Used to remember preferences like language, theme, region.
